BillingChangeMonthlyPackageTransfer.action: Action to perform on the instance; current valid value: toPrepay
BillingChangeMonthlyPackageTransfer.relationCds: Data disks associated with the change; deprecated. Pay-as-you-go (postpaid) CDS must be converted to monthly subscription (prepaid) together with the BCC instance.
BillingChangeMonthlyPackageTransfer.autoRenew: Whether to automatically renew the instance upon expiration. Values: **true**: auto-renew, **false**: do not auto-renew. Default: false.
BillingChangeMonthlyPackageTransfer.autoRenewPeriod: Duration of each automatic renewal (unit: months). Valid values: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 12, 24, 36. Default: 1. This parameter is valid only when autoRenew is true.
